event_text: To the back of the school building
"I don't have anything to do here, I'll be late, okay?"
event_text: To the back of the school building
event_text: To the back of the school building
“Hey, I’m really going to lose track of you!!”
"Hosoyama? A janitor? I often see you heading towards the back of the school building.
After that, the female students also go into the back of the school building, being careful not to be seen... ”
I hate you, the ice princess who stole my ace's confession. ”
"You're in good shape." But strangely enough, I'm not jealous. Is it because the other person is an otaku? ”
"Janitor? I had my breasts rubbed the other day.
On the contrary, I took the money! ! I don't even want to be a daddy partner. ”
“You can rub my breasts while chewing my tongue!!”
If that's the case, I saw it yesterday, going into the back of the school building. ”
``Hosoyama came out in a rare hurry and said.
Wow, that guy had a huge erection! ! It was so huge! ! ”
"A janitor? I sometimes go behind the school building because of my job as a manager...
That's suspicious. I almost got dragged into the cleaning supplies closet once. ”
``If you slack off even a little bit, I'll kill you behind the school building!!
"Haruka Kagami? You're so beautiful, aren't you?
Could you please be my manager? The members will be happy.”
It's all just a dream after all. Don't lick me! ! ”
